summary: Shaky handheld cellphone footage of HSI/ICE agents in camo wrestling and restraining suspects on the ground and frisking a man against a chain-link fence in an industrial area, capped by an ICE/DHS logo end card. There is no fast-cutting, color grading, or added graphics beyond the end card. It is unedited footage documenting an arrest. The automated music_score is high, while the visuals carry no music track. On-screen text includes 'POLICE ICE' and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'.
